title: hello config
description: Configuration for the `hello` minimalist homepage / iframe dashboard.

$schema.description: URL of the JSON Schema for this file. Editors use it to provide autocomplete.

title.description: Page title and PWA app name. Shown in the browser tab and when the site is installed as a PWA.

defaultTab.description: `id` of the tab to open on first load. Must match one of `tabs[].id`. Defaults to the first tab.

groupOrder.description: Explicit ordering for groups in the sidebar. Groups listed here render in this order after any ungrouped tabs; groups not listed fall back to first-occurrence order after the listed ones.

tabs.description: The list of sites shown as icons in the sidebar.

id.description: Unique, stable identifier. Used in the URL hash (e.g. `#sonarr`) and in DOM ids. Letters, digits, `-` and `_` only.

name.description: Display name. Shown in the tooltip and page title.

url.description: The URL to load in the iframe for this tab.

icon.description:
Icon. Any of:
- Emoji or text: `📺`
- Absolute URL: `https://.../logo.png`
- Path served by this app: `/icons/custom.svg`
- selfh.st compact: `sh-plex`, `sh-plex.png`, `sh-plex-light.webp`
- selfh.st explicit (supports light/dark variants): `selfhst:plex`, `selfhst:plex/light`, `selfhst:plex.png`, `selfhst:plex/dark.webp`

preload.description: If true, the iframe is built at boot (but hidden) so the page is already loaded when you first click this tab.

group.description: Group label. Tabs sharing a group render together in the sidebar with a thin divider between groups. Group order follows top-level `groupOrder` if set, otherwise first-occurrence order.

ping.description: Health check for this tab. `true` pings the main `url`. A URL string pings that URL instead (useful when the public URL is behind auth or you want to probe a LAN `http://host:port` directly). Omit / `false` to disable.

allow.description: iframe `allow` attribute. Semicolon-separated feature policy tokens (e.g. `fullscreen; autoplay`).
